favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Mods you've saved to revisit later.
favorites.emptyDescription: Tap the star on any mod card to save it here for later.

foundry.title: Mod Foundry
foundry.subtitle: Import a hero skin and customize cards, effect colors, and ability sounds with a live preview

empty.title: Craft your hero skin
empty.description: Import an installed skin VPK to edit its cards, recolor its effects, and swap ability sounds. Map mods aren't supported here — the Foundry is for hero skins.

import.dialogDescription: Pick one of your hero skins or import a local VPK. Only hero skins are shown — maps and audio mods are excluded.
import.noDefaultSkins: No default skins match your search.
import.noHeroSkins: No hero skins found in your library yet. Install a hero skin, or import a local VPK.
import.fileHint: Import any hero-skin VPK from disk. Map mods will be rejected.

tabs.skinEmpty: No model files found in this skin.
tabs.cardsEmpty: No card textures found in this skin.
tabs.effectsEmpty: No particle effects found in this skin.
tabs.soundsEmpty: No sound files found in this skin.

cards.loadFailed: Couldn't load the card art for this skin.
cards.noModCards: No mod card art found for this hero.
cards.noDefaultCards: No default card art found for this hero.

preview.empty: Import a skin to see it here
preview.selectCard: Select a card to preview it
preview.soundsPlaceholder: Select a sound file to inspect its details

inspector.title: Properties
inspector.noSelection: Select an item to see its details.
inspector.skinSoon: Select a model to inspect its live preview.
inspector.cardsSoon: Upload and crop a custom card image here — coming soon.
inspector.effectsSoon: Recolor ability effects (solid, gradient, rainbow) here — coming soon.
inspector.soundsSoon: Assign and preview custom ability sounds here — coming soon.

errors.notHeroSkinDescription: This VPK doesn't look like a hero skin. The Mod Foundry only supports hero skins.
errors.analyzeFailedDescription: The file could not be parsed. Make sure it's a valid Deadlock VPK.

servers.title: Server Browser
servers.subtitle: Browse custom Deadlock servers
servers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, map, or game mode

filters.withPlayersOff: Show only servers with active players
filters.joinableTooltip: Open lobbies with players that aren't full

detail.noGateway: Open the Deadlock console and paste the connect code.
detail.noConnect: This server isn't accepting direct connections right now.
detail.noMods: This server isn't running any mods.
detail.keepMyMods: Keep my installed mods enabled (layer server mods on top of your active profile)

staging.awaitingCustomConfirm: Waiting for confirmation to download custom mods...
staging.customConfirmTitle: This server wants to download custom-provider mods
staging.customConfirmDescription: These files come from third-party URLs (not GameBanana). Review the sources before allowing the download.

empty.title: No servers found
empty.description: Try clearing some filters or check back in a moment. The list refreshes automatically.
empty.errorDescription: We couldn't load servers right now. Please try again in a moment.

hostCta.title: Running a custom Deadlock server?
hostCta.description: Share it here so other players can find and join it.
hostCta.openError: Couldn't open the server hosting page.

myMods.checkForUpdatesTooltip: Check if your mods have updates
myMods.checkForUpdatesError: Failed to check for mod updates
myMods.allModsUpToDate: All mods are up to date
myMods.subtitle: Mods you have downloaded or installed
myMods.noModsDescription: You haven't installed any mods yet. Get started by browsing available mods or analyzing your local addons folder.
myMods.modLimitTooltipP1: Deadlock limits how many addon files the game can load at once. The usual cap is {{max}}.
myMods.modLimitTooltipP2: Your library can still list more mods than that, because one mod can ship several addon files.
myMods.modLimitTooltipP3: The first pair is enabled mods versus your full library. The second is how many addon files those enabled mods use, next to the cap.
myMods.updateAllDescription: Download and install the latest versions of all your mods

batchUpdate.title: Update All Mods
batchUpdate.description: The following mods have updates available. A backup of your current addons will be created before updating.
batchUpdate.backupNote: A backup will be created automatically before updating

myMods.disableAllConfirmBody: This will disable all {{count}} currently enabled mods. The mods will remain in your library and can be re-enabled at any time.

modOrdering.manageOrderTooltip: Manage the order in which mods are loaded
modOrdering.title: Manage Mod Load Order
modOrdering.description: Drag and drop to reorder your mods. Mods at the top load first, mods at the bottom load last.

mods.subtitle: Updated hourly, with new mods added every hour.
mods.mapsWarning: Custom maps are experimental and largely depend on how their authors package them. Not all maps will work out of the box through the mod manager.
mods.noModsMatchFilters: No mods match your current search and filters
mods.emptyClearFilters: Try clearing some filters to see more results
mods.deleteConfirmBody: This will remove it from your mods list and delete all associated files. This action cannot be undone. Make sure Deadlock is closed before deleting.
mods.deleteErrorVpkInUse: Some mod files are currently in use by the game. Please close Deadlock and try again.

vpkScanAlert.title: Unrecognized mod files found
vpkScanAlert.titleTooltipP1: These are addon files in your mods folder that the mod manager doesn't recognize. They may have been added manually, or the manager installed them but lost track of them.
vpkScanAlert.titleTooltipP2: Use Analyze to scan these files and reconnect them to matching mods from the catalog.
vpkScanAlert.titleTooltipP3: Usually you can delete these files and install the missing mods through the manager, or add them manually so they show up in your library. Manually added mods won't check for updates automatically.
vpkScanAlert.description: {{count}} local addon files are not linked to mods in your library.
vpkScanAlert.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" from your addons folder. This action cannot be undone.
vpkScanAlert.deleteAllConfirmBody: This will permanently delete {{count}} mod file(s) from your addons folder. This action cannot be undone.
vpkScanAlert.deleteAllError: Failed to delete some mod files

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.noDownloadsMatchFilter: There are no downloads matching your current filter.

notifications.modContainsFiles: {{modName}} contains {{fileCount}} files. Select which ones to install.

warnings.obsoleteDescription: This mod is no longer available on the mods store and may not work with the current game version.
warnings.staleModDescription: This mod has {{count}} unresolved reports and hasn't been updated since {{date}}. It may be broken with the current game version.
warnings.updatedRecentlyDescription: This mod's files were updated in the last 7 days.
warnings.updateAvailableDescription: A newer version of this mod is available. Download again to get the latest files.

mapCommandInAutoexec.title: Map command detected in autoexec
mapCommandInAutoexec.body: Your autoexec.cfg contains a map command ("map {{mapName}}"). This will load a custom map instead of the normal game.

mapModsInstalled.title: Map mods are installed
mapModsInstalled.body: You have map mod(s) installed: {{modNames}}. These may cause issues if you try to load the normal game map or join matchmaking.

common.gameinfoAutoReset: Game configuration was corrupted and has been automatically repaired.
common.failedToFetchMods: Failed to fetch mods. Try again later.
common.fsWritable: Addons folder and gameinfo.gi are not read-only
common.fsReadonly: Addons folder or gameinfo.gi is read-only (check file permissions)
common.fsUnknown: Could not verify addons folder or gameinfo.gi

settings.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the application interface
settings.languageSettingsDescription: Choose your preferred language for the application interface
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize the appearance of the application.
settings.themeDescription: Choose between light, dark, or system theme
settings.occultGeometryDescription: Show the decorative occult sigils and mandalas in the background.
settings.animateOccultGeometryDescription: Slowly rotate and pulse the background sigils. Animations automatically pause when the window is in the background.
settings.flashbangDescription: Forces Light Mode between 8 PM and 8 AM, regardless of selected theme
settings.audioVolumeDescription: Adjust the volume for audio previews and playback
settings.launchOptionsDescription: Customize the launch options for the game. These are applied regardless of the game mode selected (Vanilla or Modded).
settings.networkDescription: Choose how mod downloads connect to GameBanana file servers. Default uses the standard download link from the API.
settings.fileserverEmpty: No file servers available right now. Try refreshing the list.
settings.fileserverDefault: Standard download link from the API
settings.fileserverLoadError: Could not load file servers. Check your connection and try again.
settings.proxyDescription: Route all app traffic through an HTTP, HTTPS, or SOCKS5 proxy. Changes only take effect once you save.
settings.proxyEnableDescription: Route all network traffic through a proxy server
settings.proxyHostRequired: Host is required when the proxy is enabled.
settings.proxyAuthDescription: Enable if the proxy requires credentials
settings.proxyBypassDescription: Comma-separated list of hosts that should bypass the proxy (e.g. localhost, 127.0.0.1, .local)
settings.pluginDescription: Manage plugins and integrations for the desktop app.
settings.systemSettingsDescription: Mod Manager Settings. These do not affect the game.
settings.gameConfigDescription: Manage gameinfo.gi file backup, restoration, and validation for safe modding.
settings.gamePathDescription: The path to your Deadlock game installation. The mod manager will auto-detect this, but you can manually set it if needed.
settings.invalidGamePath: Invalid game path. Please select a valid Deadlock installation folder.
settings.steamPathSectionDescription: Configure how the mod manager locates your Steam installation for launching the game and related features.
settings.invalidSteamPath: Invalid Steam path. Please select a valid Steam installation folder.
settings.steamPathToggleFailed: Failed to update Steam path settings
settings.defaultSortDescription: Choose the default sort order for the Mods page.
settings.toolsDescription: Utility functions for managing your mods
settings.dangerZoneDescription: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone.
settings.clearDownloadCacheDescription: Removes cached download files. Your installed mods are not affected.
settings.confirmClearDownloadCache: This will remove downloaded archives and extracted files for remote mods. Local mods are preserved.
settings.clearAllModsDataDescription: Permanently deletes all mod metadata, local mods, and preview images. This cannot be undone.
settings.confirmClearAllModsData: This will permanently delete ALL mod data including local mods, their metadata, and preview images. Local mods cannot be recovered. Are you sure?
settings.clearAllModsDescription: Removes all mods from the application and your game folder. This cannot be undone.
settings.confirmClearAllMods: Are you sure you want to clear all mods? This action cannot be undone.
settings.addonsBackupDescription: Create and restore backups of your installed mods.
settings.deleteBackupConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this backup?
settings.restoreStrategyReplaceDescription: Removes all current addons before restoring the backup. Ensures a clean state matching the backup exactly.
settings.restoreStrategyMergeDescription: Restores backup files while keeping existing addons. Files with the same name will be overwritten.
settings.restoreStrategyWarning: This action cannot be undone. Please choose carefully.
settings.autoBackupEnabledDescription: Automatically create a backup of your mods before batch updating mods
settings.maxBackupCountDescription: Older backups will be automatically removed when this limit is reached
settings.backupWillRemoveOldestDescription: Creating a new backup will remove {{count}} old backup(s) to stay within your retention limit.
settings.autoReapplyModsDescription: Automatically reapply mods when the mod manager is launched.
settings.launchVanillaNoArgsDescription: Launch the game in vanilla mode without additional arguments.
settings.modsStorePaginationDescription: Show the Mods Store and Library as pages instead of one continuous scrolling list.
settings.heroConflictWarningDescription: Show a warning when enabling a second mod for a hero that already has an active mod.
settings.createCustomSettingDescription: Add a custom setting to the game. These will be added to the game as launch options.
settings.keyDescription: Most settings are a key-value pair
settings.valuePlaceholder: true or false or any value
settings.developerModeDescription: Enable developer mode to access advanced tools and debugging features

ingestTool.title: Matchdata Ingest Tool
ingestTool.description: Automatically scan Steam cache directory for Deadlock matchdata files and send match data to the API

settings.autoUpdateDescription: Automatically check for and notify about application updates on startup.
settings.updateChannelDescription: Choose which release channel to receive updates from.
settings.updateChannelRestartRequired: Restart Deadlock Mod Manager to switch update channels.
settings.linuxGpuCompatDescription: Workaround for a webkit2gtk rendering bug on NVIDIA GPUs with Wayland. Auto mode detects your GPU and display server at startup. Forcing this on when not needed causes poor scrolling performance.
settings.linuxGpuCompatCurrentlyActive: Workaround is currently active for this session.
settings.confirmClearModsStateBody: This will remove all mods from the application but will NOT delete them from your game folder. You can re-scan your mods folder to restore them.
settings.autoexecDescription: Manage your autoexec.cfg file. Changes require game restart.
settings.autoexecPlaceholder: Add your custom console commands here...
settings.autoexecReadonlyNote: Note: Sections marked with 'DO NOT EDIT' are managed by the mod manager and will be restored automatically.
settings.autoexecInfoBody1: Autoexec is a CFG file for launching a game with set convars (think console command) that will get automatically executed on launch of the game.
settings.autoexecInfoBody2: The mod manager uses this file to set the crosshair settings automatically without needing to run commands in the console. You can still edit the file manually if you want to add more commands.
settings.autoexecInfoBody3: P.S: the autoexec config can never be empty if added as launch option or else it'll crash the game.
settings.autoexecLibraryDescription: Browse community-sourced client-side commands. Entries marked Default restore documented defaults rather than tune behavior.
settings.autoexecCommandWarning: Commands in this library are community-sourced and may be removed, hidden, or changed between Deadlock updates. Test added commands carefully and remove anything that causes problems.
settings.autoexecCommandAdded: Command added to config. Save to apply.
settings.autoexecClearConfirmBody: This will remove all commands from your autoexec.cfg. Managed crosshair and map sections will be restored automatically. An empty autoexec file can crash the game if the autoexec launch option is enabled.

fpsMaxUi.description: FPS limit while game UI is displayed. 0 means unlimited.

engineNoFocusSleep.description: Sleep delay when the game window is not focused. 0 keeps FPS active in background.

engineLowLatencySleepAfterClientTick.description: Moves low-latency sleep after client simulation when low latency is active.

clUpdaterate.description: Requested server update packets per second.

clHudTelemetryNetMisdeliveryShow.description: Show missed user commands and server snapshots only in poor conditions.

citadelHideReplayHud.description: Default/reset: keep the replay HUD visible.

citadelShopDefaultTab.description: Default/reset: use the game's default shop tab.

clTrueviewShowStatus.description: Show TrueView status. 0 never, 1 only if problem, 2 always.

minimapUpdateRateHz.description: Default/reset: update the minimap at 60 Hz.

citadelMinimapUnitClickRadius.description: Default/reset: restore minimap unit click radius.

citadelMinimapPlayerWidth.description: Default/reset: restore minimap player icon width.

citadelMinimapLocalPlayerWidth.description: Default/reset: restore local player minimap icon width.

citadelMinimapMaxIconShrink.description: Default/reset: restore minimap icon shrink behavior.

citadelMinimapOverlapScanDistance.description: Default/reset: restore minimap overlap scan distance.

citadelMinimapSpectatorFowTeamView.description: Default/reset: restore spectator minimap team view.

citadelPrivateLobbyBotDifficulty.description: Default/reset: restore private lobby bot difficulty.

citadelPrivateLobbyCheatsEnabled.description: Default/reset: keep private lobby cheats disabled.

citadelPrivateLobbyIsPubliclyVisible.description: Default/reset: keep private lobbies hidden from public lists.

citadelPrivateLobbyServerRegion.description: Default/reset: restore the private lobby server region.

fovDesired.description: Default/reset: restore base field of view.

zoomSensitivityRatio.description: Default/reset: restore ADS / zoom sensitivity scale.

citadelAutoQueueBuild.description: Automatically queue selected build at game start.

soundDeviceOverride.description: Default/reset: use the default sound device.

voiceVox.description: Default/reset: use push-to-talk instead of always-on VOX.

voiceAlwaysSampleMic.description: Default/reset: keep voice input stream closed until needed.

voiceDeviceOverride.description: Default/reset: use the default voice capture device.

citadelAutoHighlightSecondsBefore.description: Default/reset: restore replay auto-highlight lead-in seconds.

citadelAutoHighlightSecondsAfter.description: Default/reset: restore replay auto-highlight follow-up seconds.

citadelReplayManagerDownloadChunkSize.description: Default/reset: restore replay download chunk size.

citadelReplayManagerDownloadSimultaneous.description: Default/reset: restore replay download parallel request count.

settings.autoexecSaved: Autoexec config saved successfully! Restart game for changes to take effect.
settings.autoexecReadonlySectionDeleted: Read-only sections cannot be deleted. They will be restored on save.
settings.loggingDescription: Access log files for troubleshooting issues.
settings.crashDumpsDescription: Crash dumps generated when Deadlock crashes for debugging.
settings.openCrashDumpsFolderError: Failed to open crash dumps folder
settings.askAiDescription: Open an AI assistant with your log files to help troubleshoot issues.
settings.askAiConfirmBody: Log files may contain personal information like file paths and usernames. The logs will be copied to your clipboard and you can paste them into the AI chat. Do you want to continue?
settings.logsCopiedAndAiOpened: Logs copied to clipboard. {{provider}} opened - paste with Ctrl+V
settings.customCrosshairsDescription: Enable or disable custom crosshair settings in the autoexec config. When disabled, the crosshair section will be removed from the autoexec file.

featureFlags.title: Experimental Features
featureFlags.description: Opt in to experimental features and try new functionality before it's released to everyone.
featureFlags.loginRequired: You need to be logged in to manage feature flags
featureFlags.noExposedFlags: No experimental features are currently available
featureFlags.onlyBooleanToggles: Only boolean feature flags can be toggled

game.createBackupTip: Creating a backup is recommended before making modifications.
game.resetSuccess: gameinfo.gi reset to vanilla state successfully
game.confirmRestore: Are you sure you want to restore gameinfo.gi from backup? This will overwrite the current file.
game.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset gameinfo.gi to vanilla state? This will remove all mod configurations and restore the original game settings.

privacy.title: Privacy & Content
privacy.description: Control how NSFW (Not Safe For Work) content is displayed and filtered.
privacy.hideNSFWDescription: Completely hide mods marked as NSFW from lists and search results
privacy.showLikelyNSFWDescription: Show content that might be NSFW but isn't explicitly marked (overrides hiding)
privacy.disableNSFWBlurDescription: Show NSFW content without any blur effect (content still shows NSFW badge)
privacy.blurStrengthDescription: How much to blur NSFW content when visible (pixels)
privacy.rememberPerItemChoicesDescription: Remember when you choose to show/hide specific NSFW items
privacy.analyticsEnabledDescription: Help improve the application by sending anonymous usage statistics and feature analytics

about.title: About
about.description: Deadlock Mod Manager is a tool for installing and managing mods for the Valve game "Deadlock".
about.thirdPartyDisclaimerDescription: All mods available through this application are third-party content created by community members. Mods are not created, reviewed, verified, or endorsed by the Deadlock Mod Manager project. Install mods at your own discretion.
about.thirdPartyDisclaimerShort: Mods are third-party content not created, reviewed, or endorsed by Deadlock Mod Manager.
about.gamebananaDescription: Our primary mod source and the backbone of this application. GameBanana provides the comprehensive mod database and API that makes browsing, discovering, and downloading Deadlock mods possible.
about.deadlockRichPresenceDescription: Discord Game Presence was only possible thanks to Jelloge's Deadlock Rich Presence project and its work mapping Deadlock console log events for rich presence.
about.tauriDescription: The powerful framework that enables this cross-platform desktop application. Tauri combines the best of web technologies with native performance and security.
about.shadcnDescription: Beautiful and accessible React components that provide the foundation for our modern user interface. Copy, paste, and customize to perfection.
about.tailwindDescription: The utility-first CSS framework that powers our responsive design and consistent styling throughout the application.
about.openSourceDescription: Built with amazing open source technologies including React, TypeScript, and many other libraries that make modern applications possible. Thank you to all contributors and maintainers.
about.updateFailed: Failed to check for updates, you may need to manually update the app.
about.copyright: Not affiliated with Valve. Deadlock, and the Deadlock logo are registered trademarks of Valve Corporation.
about.resetOnboardingDescription: Show the onboarding wizard again on next launch.
about.resetOnboardingSuccess: Onboarding will be shown on next launch

update.newVersionAvailable: A new version ({{version}}) is available. You are currently on version {{currentVersion}}.
update.failedWithMessage: Update failed: {{message}}. You may need to manually update the app.

addMods.title: Add Mods
addMods.subtitle: Upload mod files. Drag & drop is supported.
addMods.dropAreaText: Drop files/folders here, or click to select
addMods.finalizeDescription: Only the name is required. You can fill the rest later.
addMods.noVpkFound: No .vpk found inside .zip – stored archive for installer
addMods.noVpkFoundInContent: No VPK files found in the uploaded content
addMods.archiveWillBeProcessed: Archive will be processed during mod installation
addMods.noVpkFoundStored: No VPK found - archive stored for manual processing

modButton.installedTooltip: Toggle to disable mod (will not delete, just disable it ingame)

addons.analyzeLocalTooltip: Scan your Deadlock game directory to find and identify existing addon files that may not be managed by this mod manager
addons.analysisResultsDescription: Found {{count}} addon(s) in your game directory
addons.identifiedAndAdded: {{count}} identified and automatically added to your library
addons.analysisSuccessWithIdentified: Analysis complete! Found {{count}} addon(s), identified {{identified}} and added to current profile
addons.analysisSuccessAllIdentified: Analysis complete! All {{identified}} addon(s) were automatically identified and added to current profile
addons.analysisWarning: Analysis complete! Found {{count}} addon(s) with {{errors}} error(s)
addons.noAddonsFound: No addons found in your game directory
addons.noEntriesFound: No entries found in VPK file
addons.failedToAddModToLibrary: Failed to add mod to library

emptyStates.noIdentifiedDesc: These addons might be custom or not in our database

onboarding.title: Welcome to Deadlock Mod Manager
onboarding.welcome: Let's get you set up with {{appName}}! This quick setup will help you get started.

disclaimer.title: Third-Party Content
disclaimer.description: All mods available through Deadlock Mod Manager are third-party content created by community members.
disclaimer.notice: Mods are not created, reviewed, verified, or endorsed by the Deadlock Mod Manager project. Install mods at your own discretion.
disclaimer.acknowledge: I understand that mods are third-party content

gamePath.title: Game Path Detection
gamePath.description: We'll automatically detect your Deadlock installation path.
gamePath.errorDescription: Please manually browse to your Deadlock installation folder.

api.title: API Connection
api.description: Checking connection to the mod database server.
api.errorDescription: Please check your internet connection and try again.

network.title: Download Server
network.description: Choose which server to download mods from. You can test server latency to find the fastest one for your location, or leave it on default.

addons.title: Existing Mods
addons.description: We'll check if you have any existing mods in your game folder.
addons.noModsDescription: You can start fresh and browse mods from the catalog.
addons.modsFoundDescription: Would you like to analyze and import them?

telemetryConsent.title: Help Us Improve
telemetryConsent.description: We would really appreciate it if you keep usage analytics enabled. It helps us understand which features matter and where to focus improvements.
telemetryConsent.dialogDescription: Usage analytics is currently off. You can turn it on anytime in Settings, but enabling it now helps us improve the app for everyone.
telemetryConsent.whatWeCollectHwid: An anonymous hardware ID to distinguish installs without identifying you
telemetryConsent.whatWeCollectFeatures: Which features you use in the app
telemetryConsent.whatWeDoNotCollectPersonal: No account details, messages, or mod file contents
telemetryConsent.enableSwitchDescription: Only an anonymous hardware ID and feature usage events are sent
telemetryConsent.thankYouDescription: Your anonymous usage data helps us improve Deadlock Mod Manager for everyone.

failedToParseGameConfiguration.instruction: Please follow these steps to resolve the issue:
steps: Go to Settings → Game and reset gameinfo.gi to Vanilla.
Restart the Mod Manager and click 'Launch Modded'.

429.title: Too many requests
429.description: Slow down a moment, then try again.

offline.title: Can't connect to the server
offline.description: Check your internet connection, or the server might be down. See status.deadlockmods.app for live status.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.description: Try again. If it keeps happening, check status.deadlockmods.app or restart the app.

500.title: Server error
500.description: Something broke on our end. Try again in a few minutes, or check status.deadlockmods.app.

503.title: Server is down
503.description: Try again shortly. Check status.deadlockmods.app for updates.

403.title: GameBanana is temporarily blocking us
403.description: GameBanana sometimes throttles traffic during heavy load. Wait a few minutes and try again. A VPN or different network can also help.

404.title: We couldn't find that mod
404.description: It may have been deleted from GameBanana, or it hasn't been synced to our database yet. Please try again later.

404.title: Profile link not found
404.description: This shared profile link is no longer valid. Ask the owner to share a new one.

404.title: Server is no longer online
404.description: This server has shut down or stopped reporting. Refresh the server list to see what's currently available.

403.title: Sign in to do that
403.description: You need to be signed in to like or publish a crosshair.

404.title: Crosshair not found
404.description: This crosshair was removed by its author or never existed.

500.title: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable
500.description: Our authentication service is having trouble. Please try again in a few minutes.

generic.title: Couldn't reach sign-in
generic.description: We couldn't talk to the authentication service. Check your connection and try again.

modForm.title: Mod metadata
modForm.description: Add optional details. Only the name is required.

whatsNew.title: What's New
whatsNew.welcome: Welcome to the latest version of {{appName}}!

1.0.0.title: v1.0 - Complete UI Overhaul, more stable mod management, and more
features: ✨ Complete UI overhaul with redesigned navigation, layouts, and styling
✨ Server Browser to discover, filter, and join live Deadlock servers (internal users only)
✨ Mod favorites with star toggle and favorites filter in the Mods Store
✨ Mod variant picker for mods with multiple versions
✨ Hero detection with conflict warnings when multiple mods target the same hero
✨ File chooser for mods with multiple download archives
✨ Autoexec command library with search, clear, and launch toggle
✨ "Disable all mods" button in My Mods
✨ Custom Steam path setting with auto-detection as the default
✨ Optional CEF runtime as an alternative to the system WebView
✨ Stable/nightly update channel selection in Settings
✨ Proxy support (HTTP, HTTPS, SOCKS5) in Settings
✨ Warning dialog when game path can't be found
✨ Font install prompts for local mods that include custom fonts
✨ Analytics consent prompt during onboarding
✨ "Delete All" button to quickly remove unrecognized files from addons
✨ Plugins section now visible in Settings for everyone
📦 Mod details load faster by showing cached data immediately
📦 Mod scanning no longer causes UI lag
📦 Improved mod disable/delete reliability on Windows
📦 Improved drag-and-drop for local mods on Linux
📦 Show active mod files on the mod detail page
📦 Mod of the Week highlights rotate more evenly across top mods
📦 Better mod descriptions with improved formatting and in-app links
📦 Improved NSFW label visibility on mod previews
📦 Redesigned unrecognized files alert in My Mods
📦 Improved hero detection reliability
📦 Server browser now shows links to required mods
📦 Nightly builds now show a clear Nightly label with details on hover
📦 Themes are now enabled by default for new installs
📦 Discord Rich Presence plugin replaced with built-in Discord Game Presence
📦 Error messages are now more readable
📦 Descriptions added to Danger Zone actions in Settings
📦 Library sorted by load order by default
📥 Download dialog now shows extraction progress
📥 Flatpak self-update support
📥 Update dialog only preselects previously installed files
🎨 Redesigned onboarding wizard
🎨 Overhauled Custom Theme Builder with ambient effects
🎨 Improved dashboard trending section scroll indicator
🎨 Loading animations for Mods Store and mod detail pages
🔧 Fixed variant switching losing previously downloaded files
🔧 Fixed mod toggle button accidentally opening the mod page
🔧 Fixed local mods showing a blank detail page
🔧 Fixed mod files being rejected when dragged into the app
🔧 Fixed audio previews creating duplicate audio streams on Linux
🔧 Fixed audio preview playback glitches
🔧 Fixed last row in Mods Store and Maps being cut off
🔧 Fixed sidebar transparency slider direction
🔧 Fixed Mods Library header overlapping at narrow widths
🔧 Fixed sidebar labels overlapping at small window sizes
🔧 Fixed non-scrollable lists in various dialogs
🔧 Fixed dashboard "In Queue" count only showing active downloads
🔧 Fixed false "update available" for restored mods
🔧 Fixed themes being permanently disabled after settings migration
🔧 Fixed mod install button not showing progress during extraction
🔧 Fixed file counts and stale content when switching mod variants
🔧 Fixed mods with multiple files not all being recognized
🔧 Fixed Deadlock not launching on Linux with Flatpak Steam
🔧 Fixed game path resetting on every restart on Linux
🔧 Fixed CEF runtime missing in Flatpak builds
🔧 Removed unnecessary error popups when hero images fail to load
🔧 Removed duplicate NSFW labels on dashboard
🔧 Cleaned up duplicate backup sections in Settings
🔧 Library order preserved when filtering by install status
🔧 Auto-recover from corrupted game configuration on launch
🔧 Proxy settings moved to the Network tab
🌐 Added Belarusian language support (thanks drodn from Discord)
🌐 Added Korean language support

0.18.0.title: Custom Maps, Download Servers & UI Improvements
features: 🧪 Custom maps support (experimental — enable in Settings > Experimental)
✨ Add GameBanana file server selection (for better download speed)
✨ Mods now show a Support Author button with links to the author's Patreon, GitHub Sponsors, and Ko-fi
🔧 Add tooltips to collapsed sidebar icons showing the navigation label on hover
🔧 Better image display in mod gallery and mod detail page
🔧 Apply pagination setting to Mod Library page
🔧 Revamped mod report system (we only allow broken mod reports)
🔧 Update game config error message to reference Settings > Game

0.17.0.title: Mod store, themes, backups, logging, and fixes
features: ✨ Time period filters in the mod store; stack sorts together with filters.
✨ While searching, the store sorts by relevance and restores your previous sort when search clears.
✨ Quick filters respect include and exclude mode.
🔧 Clearer mod store search with fewer weak matches.
✨ GameBanana sound categories: ability, weapon, voice, kill, and music filters.
✨ Easier gallery navigation and missing translations filled in.
✨ Choose paginated or continuous scrolling in the Mods Store (pagination default on Linux).
🔧 Settings sidebar scrolls when content is long.
✨ Backup options in a dedicated Backups tab.
✨ Configure auto-backup before batch updates and how many backups to keep.
🔧 Manual backups respect retention limits, with warnings before old backups are removed.
🔧 Install no longer hangs if you close the install popup.
✨ Logging settings with log files and AI troubleshooting.
🔧 Crash dumps save under your Deadlock game folder on Windows (not the generic CrashDumps folder); dumps can be analyzed for AI help.
🔧 Auth fix so you are less likely to be signed out unexpectedly.
🎨 Deadlock API theme and improved color picking for themes and accents.
🔧 App updates: check when you use Check for updates, with fewer background checks.
🔧 Stop Game only shows when the game is running.
🔧 Mod cards refresh correctly after enable, disable, or delete.

0.16.0.title: Bug Fixes, Developer Tools & More
features: 🔧 Auto-detect NVIDIA GPU on Wayland with Auto/Force On/Force Off modes to avoid perf loss on non-NVIDIA
🔧 Fix macOS compatibility: platform detection, game path sync, deep links, and cross-platform mods storage
🔧 Fix local mod installs getting stuck with invalid state
🔧 Throttle app update checker to prevent excessive requests to the update server
🔧 Fix false update prompt right after mod installation
📥 Show download progress percentage in multi-file download dialog
🔌 Update OTA plugin version
✨ Add volume slider in bottom bar for quick audio level adjustment
🔧 Fix wrong mod file deletion after reordering
🔧 Fix critical and high security vulnerabilities by updating dependencies and adding pnpm overrides
🔧 Fix empty Mod Load Order dialog on first open

0.15.0.title: Mod Updates, OTA Updates & Bug Fixes
features: 🔄 Update All button to mass update all mods with automatic backup
🔄 Individual mod update button on mod detail page
📥 OTA app update system with background polling and install flow
🐧 Opt-in Linux GPU optimization for WebKit rendering compatibility
🔒 Fix security issue where embedded links could navigate the webview away
🔧 Fix "Back to Mods" button returning to wrong page
🔧 Keep Game_Language in gameinfo.gi SearchPaths rewrites
🐧 Fix opening folders, URLs, and browser flows on Linux AppImage

0.14.1.title: Theme Toggle Improvements & Bug Fixes
features: 🎨 Replace theme activation buttons with toggle switches for better UX
🔧 Fix eyedropper button closing color picker modal immediately after click
🔧 Fix Arcane theme border colors not updating when accent color changes

0.14.0.title: Arcane Theme, Mod Updates & Improvements
features: 🎨 Add Arcane theme with customizable accent colors and gradient effects
🔄 Mod cards now show "Update available" and "Updated recently" indicators when mod files change
⚠️ Add stale mod warning for mods with multiple reports and no updates for 30+ days
📋 Add GameBanana issues page disclaimer to report dialog
🔧 Fix mod reordering and deletion issues
🔧 Fix local mods imported via Add page not being toggleable
🔧 Fix split replay storage by symlinking to a single location

0.13.1.title: Third-Party Content Disclaimer & Improvements
features: 📋 Add third-party content disclaimer as first onboarding step to meet code signing requirements
🌐 Add Bulgarian language support

0.13.0.title: Bug Fixes & Improvements
features: 🔧 Fixed broken deep links
🔧 Improved logging in desktop app
🔧 Ensure we identify logged in users using their USER ID

0.12.0.title: Auth Refactor
features: 🔒 Auth refactor - improved authentication and authorization flow

0.11.1.title: Crosshair UX Improvements & Japanese Support
features: 🎨 Custom crosshair UX improvements - option to disable and delete crosshairs from history
🌐 Japanese language support added to the application
🔧 Minor bug fixes and stability improvements

0.11.0.title: Crosshairs & Autoexec Support
features: 🎯 Crosshair publishing feature - create, publish, and browse community crosshairs with a built-in generator
⚙️ Autoexec configuration editor - manage your autoexec.cfg file directly from the app
🔧 Improved cache ingestion efficiency and plugin asset handling
⌨️ Updated zoom shortcut key and improved shortcut display formatting

0.10.1.title: VPK & Profile Import Fixes
features: 🔧 Fixed VPK numbering to fill gaps sequentially instead of appending to the end
📁 Fixed profile import not skipping file-tree dialog for multi-file mods
🔄 Fixed VPK file selection dialog appearing when re-enabling mods with multiple files

0.10.0.title: Profile Management, Developer Tools, Plugins & Enhanced Features
features: 🛠️ Developer mode toggle with dedicated developer tools page for mod creators
🔌 Comprehensive plugin system - Background customization, Discord Rich Presence, Flashbang (scheduled light mode), Themes (including Nightshift), and Sudo (mod conflict detection)
🎨 New Bloodmoon theme with black-red gradients and crimson accents
📁 Folder-based profile management for better organization
🔄 VPK file replacement feature for rapid mod development iteration
📥 Overhauled download system for better performance and reliability
⚙️ Experimental features UI with user-specific feature flag overrides
🛠️ Ingest Tool to add your matchdata to the Deadlock API
🐛 Fixed download total size displaying as 0.00 B
📦 Mods no longer removed from addons folder in vanilla mode

0.9.2.title: Settings & Configuration
features: ⚙️ Game path settings - manually configure your game installation path for better compatibility

0.9.0.title: Mod Management & System Improvements
features: 📋 Mods ordering - organize your mods exactly how you want them
🔍 Local package scanning - automatically detect existing mods in your game directory
📊 Reporting system - help improve the app by reporting issues
🐧 Fixed Linux builds and scroll issues with pre-bundled GLS
✨ Some UI & UX polish
🔍 Search persistence through navigation

0.8.2.title: Bug Fixes & Improvements
features: 🐛 Fixed various bugs and improved stability
⚡ Performance improvements and optimizations

0.8.1.title: Technical Improvements
features: 🔧 Updated to use HTTP plugin for all API calls for improved reliability

0.8.0.title: Major Features & UI Updates + New Languages
features: 📤 Support for local mods is here!
🎵 Added volume slider for audio mod previews
🌍 Added 7 new languages: Arabic, German, French, Polish, Russian, Turkish, and Swiss German
🔽 Drag and drop mod files directly into the app
🌙 Light mode now follows your system theme automatically
✨ Filter settings now persist when navigating between pages, we also added "Exclude" filter mode
📱 Added bottom bar with status indicators for mods, downloads

0.7.0.title: Major Features & UI Refresh
features: 📦 Multi-file download support - choose which files to install when mods have multiple archives
🔒 NSFW content filtering with user controls for safe browsing
⚙️ Advanced gameinfo.gi management for better mod compatibility
🎨 Brand new logo design and enhanced UI styling throughout the app
🚀 Improved launch button animations and enhanced settings layout
📍 Smart scroll position management - keep your scroll position while browsing mods
🔍 Enhanced search relevance and sorting capabilities for better mod discovery

0.6.1.title: Deep Links & Improvements
features: 🔗 Added support for 1-click install links on GameBanana

0.6.0.title: Audio Mod Support & Launch Options
features: 🎵 Added support for audio mods - customize your Deadlock sounds
🚀 Improved launch options handling - no longer assumes "+" prefix requirement
🔧 Enhanced mod compatibility and installation process
⚡ Various performance optimizations and stability improvements

0.5.1.title: Performance & Bug Fixes
features: 🚀 Added virtualization to mods page for significantly better performance
🔧 Fixed "last updated" sort option not reflecting actual mod timestamps
🏷️ Added category and hero filters for better mod discovery
❌ Added clear button to search input for quick search reset
🔍 Improved filtering and searching functionality on the mods page
🐳 Resolved Docker compatibility issues
🎨 Enhanced mod card layout and styling
📖 Updated UI to acknowledge GameBanana as data source
⚡ Various performance optimizations and stability improvements

0.5.0.title: Stability & New Features
features: 🛡️ Fixed Windows crash issue with single-instance plugin
✨ Added this "What's New" dialog to showcase updates
⚠️ New outdated mod warning system for better mod management
🎮 Updated champion roster with latest Deadlock heroes
🔧 Fixed Custom Launch Options not respecting enabled/disabled status
🎨 Enhanced UI components and layout improvements
🔧 Various stability improvements and bug fixes

0.4.0.title: Better Download Management & UI Refresh
features: ✨ Refreshed user interface with improved navigation
📥 Enhanced download management system
🐛 Fixed mod deletion issues (thanks @Skeptic-systems)
🔧 Better error handling and user feedback

0.3.0.title: UI Refactor & Download Improvements
features: 🎨 Complete UI overhaul for better user experience
📦 Improved download management
⚡ Performance optimizations
🔄 Updated core dependencies

0.2.0.title: Error Tracking & Permissions Fix
features: 📊 Added Sentry issue tracking for better bug reports
🔐 Fixed updater permissions issues
🛡️ Enhanced error reporting and diagnostics

ui.author: Author
ui.name: Name
ui.multipleVersionsAvailable: Different versions of the mod are available.

themes.title: Themes
themes.themeDescription: Create your own themes or use curated presets.
themes.settingsDescription: Adjust appearance options and choose between curated presets or custom styles.
themes.detailedDescription: Switch the app's visual style using curated presets. While a theme is active, the Background plugin is automatically disabled to avoid visual conflicts.
themes.usageInstructions: Open the plugin, choose a preset under 'Pre-defined Themes', then press Activate. Press Deactivate to return to the default look.
themes.preDefinedDescription: Choose from carefully crafted themes designed to enhance your experience.
themes.customDescription: Create your own custom theme with your preferred colors and style.
themes.customThemeBuilderDescription: Build your own theme by selecting colors and styles.
themes.exportCustomThemeDescription: Create a pre-defined theme entry from your draft. The preview thumbnail is captured from the live preview shell.
themes.name: Name
themes.lineColorDialogDescription: Adjust color using H, S, V or paste a hex value.
themes.ambientAccentColorDialogDescription: Color for soft corner lighting behind the UI (Arcane-style ambience).
themes.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete this theme? This action cannot be undone.
themes.applyDraftGraceHint: Draft theme applied. Click "Keep" or it will revert automatically.
themes.accentColorDialogDescription: Pick the primary accent used for highlights and emphasis.
themes.popoverColorDialogDescription: Background for app shell and overlays.
themes.previewHint: Interactive miniature preview using your draft palette only.

tea.description: A cozy beige theme created for the YouTuber and Twitch streamer Snipztea.

nightshift.description: A teal-accented cyberpunk theme designed for clarity and long gaming sessions.

bloodmoon.description: A dark theme with black-red gradients and crimson accents.

arcane.description: A sleek dark theme with elegant pink-red glow effects inspired by the Arcane aesthetic.
arcane.customColorDescription: Choose a custom accent color for the Arcane theme.

deadlockApi.description: OLED black theme with electric red glow effects inspired by the Deadlock API design.

flashbang.title: Flashbang Mode
flashbang.description: Force Light Mode during a scheduled time window.
flashbang.detailedDescription: Flashbang mode switches the app to Light Mode during the configured hours, regardless of your theme setting.
flashbang.usageInstructions: Enable the plugin and choose start and end hour (0–23).

background.title: Background
background.detailedDescription: This plugin allows you to set custom background images for the entire application. You can use either a URL to an online image or upload a local image file. The plugin supports opacity and blur effects to customize the appearance. You can also choose whether to include the sidebar in the background effect.
background.usageInstructions: To use this plugin: 1) Enable the plugin using the toggle, 2) Enter an image URL or click 'Choose Image' to upload a local file, 3) Adjust opacity and blur settings as desired, 4) Optionally enable 'Include sidebar' to apply the background to the sidebar as well.

plugins.renderActive: Plugin is active and running in the background

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Discover featured, trending, and new mods
dashboard.noAnnouncementsDescription: There are currently no announcements. Check back later for updates and news.

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: Debug tools and utilities for development and troubleshooting.
debug.clearModsStateDescription: Resets the mod list without deleting mod files from your game folder. You can re-scan to restore them.
debug.confirmClearModsState: Are you sure you want to clear the mods state? This will remove all mods from the application but will NOT delete them from your game folder. You can re-scan your mods folder to restore them.

developer.title: Developer Tools
developer.description: Advanced tools and features for developers
developer.placeholder: Developer tools will be available here

contextMenu.failedToCopyUrl: Failed to copy URL to clipboard
contextMenu.noUrlAvailable: No URL available for this mod
contextMenu.openedModInGame: Opened mod files in game folder
contextMenu.failedToOpenModInGame: Failed to show mod in game

profiles.manageDescription: Create, edit, and switch between different mod profiles. Each profile remembers which mods you have enabled.
profiles.createDescription: Create a new profile to organize your mods. Each profile can have different mods enabled.
profiles.name: Name
profiles.nameAlreadyExists: A profile with this name already exists
profiles.defaultProfileEditLimitation: Only the description can be edited for the default profile
profiles.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete the profile '{{profileName}}'? This action cannot be undone.
profiles.switchUnexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while switching profiles
profiles.shareNoMods: Cannot share profile: no mods are enabled
profiles.noHardwareIdOrVersion: Cannot share profile: hardware ID or version information is missing
profiles.shareInstructions: Share this Profile ID with your friends so they can import your mod profile:
profiles.importDescription: Enter a Profile ID to import a shared profile from another user.
profiles.importPreviewDescription: Review the profile contents before importing. Choose how to save this profile.
profiles.importError: Failed to import profile. Please check the Profile ID and try again.
profiles.noModsIncluded: No mods are included in this profile
profiles.importOptionsDescription: Choose how to save this imported profile:
profiles.importedProfileDescription: Profile imported from shared profile ID

mapInvite.title: Invite Friends
mapInvite.instructions: Share this connect command with your friends. They can join by opening the Deadlock console (F7) and pasting it:
mapInvite.friendSteps: Your friends need to: open Deadlock, press F7 to open the console, then paste the connect command above and press Enter.
mapInvite.watchingDesc: The connect code will appear once the map server is ready.

mapHowToPlay.title: How to Play This Map
mapHowToPlay.step1: Enable the Developer Console in Deadlock settings.
mapHowToPlay.step2: Press F7 to open the console.
mapHowToPlay.step4Glitch: If you notice any visual glitches, try disconnecting and running {{mapCommand}} again to fix it.
mapHowToPlay.step5Status: Type "status" in the console and copy your SteamID, the part in square brackets (e.g. [1234567890]), including the brackets.
mapHowToPlay.step6Share: Share your SteamID like "status [your_steamid]" so others can connect to your custom map server. Enjoy!
mapHowToPlay.mapNameFallback: Check the mod description for the map name to use with this command.
mapHowToPlay.quickLaunchDesc: Configures Deadlock to automatically launch this map.

supportAuthor.title: Support the Author
supportAuthor.installedTitle: Enjoying this mod? Support the author

modDetail.activeVpkFilesDescription: VPK files from this mod currently loaded in the game addons folder.

vpkReplacement.title: Replace VPK Files
vpkReplacement.description: Replace mod files for quick iteration during development
vpkReplacement.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop VPK files here

reports.thankYouDescription: Thank you for letting the community know!
reports.reportToDevs: Report the issue details to the mod developer here:
reports.notInstalledYet: You haven't used this mod yet. Please install and try the mod before marking as broken.
reports.pleaseUpdate: Please update your mod to the latest version.
reports.lastUpdatedOn: This mod was last updated on {{date}}
reports.confirmBrokenDescription: If this mod is not working correctly, let the community know by marking it as broken.

crosshairs.title: Crosshairs
crosshairs.subtitle: Create and customize your crosshairs
crosshairs.noActiveCrosshair: No custom crosshair is currently active
crosshairs.appliedRestart: Crosshair applied! Restart game for changes to take effect.
crosshairs.removedRestart: Crosshair section removed! Restart game for changes to take effect.
crosshairs.disabledError: Custom crosshairs are disabled. Enable them in settings to apply crosshairs.

form.name: Name
form.colorDialogDescription: Choose a color for your crosshair.
form.loginRequired: You must be logged in to publish crosshairs
form.nameValidation: Name must be between 3 and 50 characters
form.descriptionValidation: Description must be less than 500 characters
form.heroesValidation: Please select at least one hero (max 5)

import.title: Import Crosshair Settings
import.description: Paste your citadel crosshair format settings below to import them into the form.
import.emptyError: Please paste crosshair settings to import
import.parseError: Failed to parse crosshair settings. Please check the format and try again.

crosshairs.noCrosshairsMatchFilters: No crosshairs match your search or filters
crosshairs.tryClearingFilters: Try clearing some filters to see more results

previewDialog.title: Preview
previewDialog.hint: Move your mouse over the preview to see how the crosshair behaves in-game.

modOptions.title: Manage Files: {{modName}}
modOptions.description: Select which files to use for this mod. Changes take effect immediately.
modOptions.noOptions: This mod has no other files.
modOptions.fetchMissingNoSource: Cannot fetch missing files: archive source URLs are unknown
modOptions.fetchMissingUnresolved: Some selected files cannot be located: {{names}}
modOptions.fetchMissingNotFound: Some files were not found in their source archives: {{names}}

fileSelector.chooseVpkFiles: Choose which VPK files you want to install from this mod.

fontInstall.title: Fonts found in mod
fontInstall.description: The mod author included font files. Would you like to install and use them?
fontInstall.installFailed: Failed to install mod fonts. Please try again.
fontInstall.discardFailed: Failed to discard mod fonts. Please try again.

heroConflict.title: {{heroName}} already has a mod
heroConflict.description: Pick which mod to use in-game. Only one mod per hero can be active at a time.
heroConflict.keepBothHint: Not recommended — only one will load.

criticalPaths.title: Critical Game Files Warning
criticalPaths.body: This mod overwrites critical game files (abilities, heroes, or generic data). Enabling it may cause game instability or crashes. Do you want to enable this mod anyway?

persist.loadFailedDescription: Your settings couldn't be loaded ({{reason}}). Changes won't be saved this session — try restarting the app.

heroParser.settingsDescription: Automatically detects which hero a mod is for by analyzing VPK file contents.
heroParser.forceRescanBody: This will re-analyze all mods without delays. The application may become unresponsive during the scan depending on the number and size of your mods.
heroParser.indexNowBody: This will immediately analyze all unindexed mods without delays. The application may become unresponsive during the scan depending on the number and size of your mods.
heroParser.clearIndexBody: This will remove all detected hero assignments from your mods. You will need to rescan or wait for the background scanner to re-index them.

gamePresence.title: Discord Game Presence
gamePresence.description: Show your live Deadlock status via Discord Rich Presence, such as current hero, match mode, party size, and more.
gamePresence.settingsDescription: Customize how Deadlock appears on your Discord profile.
gamePresence.condebugOptionDescription: Lets the mod manager read game info so your Discord status stays up to date.
gamePresence.condebugDisableWarning: You need to disable Discord Game Presence first before turning off Console Debug Log.
gamePresence.previewDescription: See how your Discord status will look with example values.
gamePresence.placeholdersDescription: Click a placeholder to append it to the last template field you focused.
gamePresence.templatesDescription: Customize the text people see on your Discord profile. Leave a field empty to use the default.

phaseDescriptions.mainMenu: Before you pick a hero or start a match
phaseDescriptions.soloHideout: When you're in the hideout by yourself
phaseDescriptions.partyHideout: When you're in the hideout with your party
phaseDescriptions.soloMatch: During a match when you're playing alone
phaseDescriptions.partyMatch: During a match when you're in a party
phaseDescriptions.postMatch: After a match ends during post-match stats screen

hero.description: The name of the hero you're currently playing

heroPresence.description: The hero's hideout status line (set by Valve per hero)

partySize.description: The number of players in your party

partyMax.description: The maximum number of players allowed in this mode

heroOverrides.title: Per-hero text
heroOverrides.description: This text only shows when you're playing this hero.
heroOverrides.noOverride: Using the default text. Type something to customize it for this hero.
heroOverrides.inheritPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default
